name: hopper
description: Reference implementation of llm-hopper protocol as a thin plugin layer. No harness reaction core; vendor CLIs bring their own runtime.

interface.shortDescription: Dispatch llm-hopper tasks from Codex and other AI CLI hosts.
interface.longDescription: Hopper is a thin plugin layer over the file-based llm-hopper protocol. It keeps state in .hopper markdown files and dispatches task-typed work to vendor CLIs such as Codex, Kimi, OpenCode, Copilot, and Agy without adding a harness reaction core.
defaultPrompt: Dispatch a Hopper task by ID.
